#nullable enable

namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial global::Demo.CustomerDto ToDto(global::Demo.Customer c)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(c);
        return new global::Demo.CustomerDto
        {
            City = c.Address.City,
        };
    }
}
